name: SiteSignal
positioning: Website audit and diagnostic signals that show what to improve next.
audience: Small businesses, creators, contractors, local service companies, coaches, agencies, and personal brands.
voice: Diagnostic, evidence-led, useful, calm, clear, low-hype.
visualStyle: Audit cards, score breakdowns, practical improvement lists, before/after diagnostics.
postingFrequency: 2-3 diagnostic posts weekly and campaign bursts when audit offers are active.
ctaOptions: Check one page before you rebuild everything.
Send the page you want diagnosed.
imageStyleRules: Avoid pretending a metric is measured if it is illustrative.
sampleHooks: A website audit should tell you what to fix, not just what is wrong.
The best website signal is usually the repeated point of friction.
